title: Geo coordinates (latitude, longitude) in location column
excerpt:

posts.author: MichalJurnik (Michal Jurnik | Intelstudios.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to request a feature which has been remove.

The location column had an ability to store coordinates (currently address only). Once a user inserted the coordinates (latitude, longitude), he was able to see all stored coordinates on map view represented as pins.

Example (old version):

Column (location type)

Map view presenting pins

Screenshot 2024-10-03 at 12.46.121920×1216 183 KB

Thank you in advance to get back the functionality we all loved!
